summary.en: USD liquidity remains in short-term tightening mode, but an inflection point is approaching. TGA at $924B is near its seasonal peak — historically, TGA begins unwinding in mid-May, which would release $200-300B back into the system. SOFR remains stable, suggesting no systemic funding stress despite bank reserves falling below $3T. The 4-6 week outlook is improving.
summary.zh: 美元流动性仍处于短期紧缩状态，但拐点临近。TGA 在 9244 亿美元接近季节性顶部——历史上 TGA 在 5 月中旬开始回落，届时将向系统释放 2000-3000 亿美元。SOFR 保持稳定，表明尽管银行准备金跌破 3 万亿美元，但没有系统性资金压力。4-6 周展望正在改善。

rrp_note.zh: 实际归零——缓冲已完全耗尽

tga_note.en: +$227.4B WoW — near seasonal peak, inflection expected mid-May
tga_note.zh: 周环比 +2274 亿美元——接近季节性顶部，预计 5 月中旬拐点

net_liquidity_change.zh: -2150 亿美元（周环比）/ -3060 亿美元（两周）——近期底部可期

details.en: The near-term liquidity picture remains stressed, but the medium-term setup is improving. TGA at $924B is approaching its historical seasonal peak — tax-season inflows typically plateau in late April and unwind through May-June. This would mechanically release $200-300B back into bank reserves. Critically, SOFR (Secured Overnight Financing Rate) remains stable, indicating that the funding stress signaled by the Fed repo lending spike has not escalated into systemic risk. The 4-6 week liquidity outlook is constructive.
details.zh: 近期流动性状况仍然承压，但中期格局正在改善。TGA 在 9244 亿美元接近历史季节性顶部——税季资金流入通常在 4 月底见顶，并在 5-6 月回落。这将机械性地向银行准备金释放 2000-3000 亿美元。关键的是，SOFR（有担保隔夜融资利率）保持稳定，表明美联储回购贷款跳升所发出的资金压力信号尚未升级为系统性风险。4-6 周流动性展望具有建设性。

reason.en: TGA surged $227B WoW to $924B, net liquidity drained $306B over two weeks, bank reserves broke below $3T. These are headwinds. However, SOFR remains stable (no systemic stress), TGA is approaching its seasonal peak, and the mid-May unwind is expected to release $200-300B. Score upgraded slightly from prior days as the forward-looking picture improves.
reason.zh: TGA 单周暴增 2270 亿美元至 9244 亿美元，净流动性两周抽水 3060 亿美元，银行准备金跌破 3 万亿美元。这些都是逆风。但 SOFR 保持稳定（无系统性压力），TGA 接近季节性顶部，预计 5 月中旬回落将释放 2000-3000 亿美元。随着前瞻性图景改善，分数较前几日略有上调。

reason.en: 88% beat rate, Q1 earnings growth at 13.2%, revenue growth at 9.9% (three-year high). Crucially, earnings growth is broadening beyond mega-cap tech — more sectors are participating. This is a structural improvement. Forward P/E at 20.9x remains stretched, but broadening earnings growth justifies a higher multiple. Beat-and-drop price action is a deduction but does not negate the underlying earnings strength.
reason.zh: 超预期率 88%，Q1 盈利增长 13.2%，收入增长 9.9%（三年新高）。关键是，盈利增长正在向大型科技股以外扩散——更多板块参与其中。这是结构性改善。前瞻市盈率 20.9 倍仍然偏高，但盈利增长扩散为更高估值提供了支撑。「超预期后下跌」价格行为是扣分项，但不能否定基本面的盈利强度。

reason.en: 60.03% of S&P 500 stocks are now above their 200-day MA — crossing the 60% threshold for the first time. NYSE A/D Line confirmed with a new high. This is a meaningful structural improvement in breadth. The 60% threshold crossing is a key signal that the rally is becoming broader and more sustainable. This is the most significant positive development in this report.
reason.zh: 标普 500 中 60.03% 的股票现在位于 200 日均线上方——首次越过 60% 门槛。NYSE A/D 线以新高确认。这是广度的重要结构性改善。60% 门槛的突破是关键信号，表明反弹正在变得更广泛、更可持续。这是本报告中最重要的正面进展。

reason.en: Sunday futures are gapping down (S&P -0.77%, Nasdaq -0.63%, Dow -0.95%), signaling that Monday's open will be lower. This is mean-reversion after Nasdaq's 13 consecutive up days. Gold fell -2.22% and BTC fell -2.31% on the weekend, suggesting broad risk-off sentiment. The price signal is cautious but not alarming — a healthy pullback after an extreme run is expected and constructive.
reason.zh: 周日期货跳空低开（标普 -0.77%，Nasdaq -0.63%，道指 -0.95%），预示周一开盘将走低。这是 Nasdaq 连涨 13 天后的均值回归。黄金周末跌 -2.22%，BTC 跌 -2.31%，显示广泛的风险规避情绪。价格信号谨慎但不令人担忧——极端拉伸后的健康回调是预期中的，也是建设性的。

trading_summary.en:
54.4 — signals improving but patience required. Breadth jumped to 60% above 200DMA — structural improvement. A/D line confirmed. Earnings broadening. But liquidity headwind ($306B drained in two weeks) and Nasdaq 13-day streak mean-reversion demand patience.

Don't panic sell on Monday's gap down, don't rush to buy the dip either. Wait for S&P to test 7,000-7,050. Add conditions: TGA below $750B + breadth above 65% + S&P pullback near 7,000. Meet two to add to 65%.
trading_summary.zh:
54.4分。信号在改善——广度跳升到 60% 越过门槛，A/D 线确认，盈利在扩散。但流动性逆风（两周蒸发 $306B）和 Nasdaq 13 连涨后的均值回归要求耐心。

周一不要在 gap down 时恐慌卖出，也不要急于抄底。等 S&P 回测 7,000-7,050 再评估。加码条件：TGA 回落至 $750B 以下 + 广度扩展至 65%+ + S&P 回调至 7,000 附近。满足两个就加到 65%。

trading_quote: Be fearful when others are greedy, and greedy when others are fearful.

note.en: Futures -0.77% — gap down Monday open expected
note.zh: 期货 -0.77%——周一预计跳空低开
期货 -0.63%——13 连涨均值回归进行中
收益率曲线陡化，与 2Y 利差 +53 bps

note.en: Short end anchored, Fed cut expectations stable
note.zh: 短端锚定，美联储降息预期稳定

note.en: Dollar near multi-week lows, mild headwind for equities
note.zh: 美元接近多周低位，对股市构成轻微逆风

note.en: Weekend pullback — risk-off unwinding, structural bull intact
note.zh: 周末回调——风险规避情绪消退，结构性看涨不变

note.en: Weekend selling pressure, holding above $73K support
note.zh: 周末卖压，守住 $73K 支撑位上方

note.en: Low VIX — complacency risk, watch for spike on Monday open
note.zh: 低 VIX——自满情绪风险，关注周一开盘是否跳升

analysis.en: BTC pulled back -2.31% on the weekend to $73,958, retreating from the $75K-$77K range. Weekend selling pressure is common in crypto and does not necessarily signal a trend reversal. The key support level is $73,000 — a close below this would be technically negative. Fear & Greed at 52 (Neutral) shows the market is not panicking. Exchange net outflows continue, suggesting long-term holders are not selling. Watch Monday's equity market open for directional cues.
analysis.zh: BTC 周末回调 -2.31% 至 $73,958，从 $75K-$77K 区间撤退。周末卖压在加密市场很常见，不一定预示趋势逆转。关键支撑位是 $73,000——收盘跌破此位在技术上将是负面信号。恐惧贪婪指数 52（中性）显示市场没有恐慌。交易所净流出持续，表明长期持有者没有卖出。关注周一股票市场开盘的方向性线索。

gold_silver_note.en: Elevated — structural bull case intact despite pullback
gold_silver_note.zh: 偏高——尽管回调，结构性看涨逻辑不变

key_driver.zh: 避险需求 + 美元走弱

key_driver_detail.en: Central bank buying + geopolitical risk — pullback is healthy consolidation
key_driver_detail.zh: 央行购金 + 地缘政治风险——回调是健康整理

analysis.en: Gold pulled back -2.22% to $4,771.30 on the weekend. This follows a strong run to near all-time highs. The pullback is consistent with healthy consolidation after an extended rally. The structural bull case — dollar weakness, central bank buying, geopolitical risk — remains intact. The gold/silver ratio at 88.2 is still historically elevated. Key support: $4,700. A hold above this level would confirm the bull trend is intact.
analysis.zh: 黄金周末回调 -2.22% 至 $4,771.30。这发生在接近历史高位的强劲上涨之后。回调与延续上涨后的健康整理一致。结构性看涨逻辑——美元走弱、央行购金、地缘政治风险——依然完整。金银比 88.2 仍处历史高位。关键支撑：$4,700。守住此位将确认牛市趋势完好。

title.zh: 流动性低谷——4-6 周化解窗口

description.en: TGA at $924B and bank reserves at $2.98T represent the near-term liquidity trough. The good news: SOFR remains stable (no systemic stress), and TGA is expected to peak and unwind in mid-May, releasing $200-300B back into the system. The 4-6 week window is the key risk period. If TGA continues rising toward $1T or bank reserves fall further, funding market stress could escalate. Monitor SOFR and Fed repo lending weekly.
description.zh: TGA 在 9244 亿美元、银行准备金在 2.98 万亿美元代表近期流动性低谷。好消息是：SOFR 保持稳定（无系统性压力），TGA 预计在 5 月中旬见顶回落，向系统释放 2000-3000 亿美元。4-6 周窗口是关键风险期。如果 TGA 继续升至 1 万亿美元或银行准备金进一步下降，融资市场压力可能升级。每周监控 SOFR 和美联储回购贷款。

title.zh: 「超预期后下跌」——本周 93 家公司报告

description.en: The beat-and-drop pattern (Abbott -4%, Schwab -5.2%, Goldman Sachs) continues. This week, 93 companies report including 7 Dow components. If the pattern persists at scale, it will weigh on indices even as aggregate earnings remain strong. The key question: is beat-and-drop a temporary sentiment issue, or does it signal that the market is genuinely beginning to price in future deterioration? This week's earnings reactions will be decisive.
description.zh: 「超预期后下跌」模式（Abbott -4%，嘉信理财 -5.2%，高盛）持续。本周 93 家公司报告，含 7 家道指成分股。如果该模式大规模持续，即使整体盈利保持强劲，也将拖累指数。关键问题：「超预期后下跌」是暂时的情绪问题，还是市场真正开始提前定价未来恶化的信号？本周的盈利反应将具有决定性意义。

title.en: Valuation Extreme — Buffett Indicator at All-Time High
title.zh: 估值极端——巴菲特指标创历史新高

description.en: Forward P/E at 20.9x is stretched relative to historical norms. The Buffett Indicator (total market cap / GDP) has reached an all-time high. Nasdaq's 13-day streak has begun mean-reverting with Sunday futures gapping down. At these valuation levels, the margin of safety is thin. A 10-15% correction from the 7,126 high would bring S&P to 6,050-6,400 — a level where risk/reward improves significantly.
description.zh: 前瞻市盈率 20.9 倍相对历史规律偏高。巴菲特指标（总市值/GDP）创历史新高。Nasdaq 13 连涨已开始均值回归，周日期货跳空低开。在这些估值水平下，安全边际很薄。从 7,126 高点回调 10-15% 将把标普带至 6,050-6,400——在那个水平风险回报比将大幅改善。

description.en: Two active divergence signals: (1) Beat-and-drop pattern continues — Abbott, Schwab, and Goldman Sachs all beat earnings but saw their stocks sold off. This multi-sector pattern is a 6-month early warning signal. (2) Sunday futures gapping down confirms that Nasdaq's 13-day streak is beginning to mean-revert. The gap down is not alarming in isolation — it is expected after such an extreme run — but combined with the beat-and-drop pattern and liquidity headwinds, it reinforces the case for patience over aggression.
description.zh: 两个活跃的背离信号：（1）「超预期后下跌」模式持续——Abbott、嘉信理财和高盛均超预期但股价遭到抛售。这种跨板块模式是 6 个月的早期预警信号。（2）周日期货跳空低开确认 Nasdaq 13 连涨开始均值回归。单独来看，跳空低开并不令人担忧——在如此极端的拉伸后这是预期中的——但结合「超预期后下跌」模式和流动性逆风，它强化了耐心优于激进的论点。

references.title: Market Data — SPX, NDX, BTC, Gold

disclaimer.en: Data sources: Yahoo Finance / FRED / U.S. Treasury / MacroMicro. For research purposes only, not investment advice.
disclaimer.zh: 数据来源：Yahoo Finance / FRED / 美国财政部 / MacroMicro。仅供研究，非投资建议。
